name: College Sleep Study
description: Sleep, mood, and academics survey for 253 college students (Ch. 4, 7 EDA). Curated subset of variables.
studyDescription: A survey of 253 college students recording sleep habits, mood and stress measures, alcohol use, and academic outcomes. Observational study; a curated subset of the original variables is included here.

variableDescriptions.gender: Student gender (0/1 as coded in the source).
variableDescriptions.lark_owl: Self-described morning (Lark), evening (Owl), or Neither chronotype.

sourceDetail: Onyper et al. (2012), via Lock5/coursepack. NOTE: this is the college-sleep survey, NOT lme4::sleepstudy (reaction time).
